lore.english:
A genetically engineered human created in a UFS laboratory. She received an elite education from an early age, excelling in both academics and physical ability. Having only been "born" about five years ago, she has a free-spirited, clumsy, and childlike personality.

Due to genetic modification, she was born with immense magical power, enabling her to control it like a superhuman. She can infuse inanimate objects with magic and manipulate them at will to annihilate her enemies. However, a major drawback is the rapid depletion of magical energy while controlling these objects. To compensate, she always carries a bag full of sweet treats to quickly replenish her energy.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Big Ass Cupcake![-]
skills.description:
Throws a big cupcake toward the enemy, dealing DMG.
After the attack, restores 1 ally with the lowest [&HP] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:790102]%[-] of their Max. [&HP].
skills.description_readable:
Throws a big cupcake toward the enemy, dealing DMG.
After the attack, restores 1 ally with the lowest [&HP] by [V3:790102]% of their Max. [&HP].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Playful Child[-]
skills.description: If the character's [&HP] is [&Color_Cyan]60%[-] or more, increases the [&HealRate] the character grants by [&Color_Cyan] [V3:790201]%[-].
skills.description_readable: If the character's [&HP] is 60% or more, increases the [&HealRate] the character grants by  [V3:790201]%.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Let's Eat Together~♪[-]
skills.description:
Gives out giant candy from the bag to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll], restoring their [&HP].
Allies with candy have [&Color_Cyan][V3:790301]%[-] of their Max. [&HP] restored, and the duration of all [&Buff](s) increased by [V2:790302] turn(s).
